MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 437c
Off Calendar Sep-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Pursuant To Ccp 437c

Granted as unopposed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions As Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff's Request For Admissions As Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is denied. The Proofs of Service for the RFAs as well as the moving papers show that both sets of the documents were served on Defendant at an address different from Defendant's address as shown in the Answer of Defendant. Therefore, Defendant did not receive proper notice of either set of papers.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
